title: The Flavorful
description: A generic mod pack which makes Minecraft more flavorful.
body:
**The Flavorful.** A generic modpack that makes Minecraft more flavorful.
This modpack improves various aspects of Minecraft such as farming, cooking, mobs, world generation, exploration, and performance.

You can configure this modpack in two ways, the lightweight way, and the immersive way.
In **the lightweight way,** You can disable Distant Horizons and Shaders, and adjust the video settings to what you think your computer can handle.
In **the immersive way,** You can do the opposite of the lightweight way, enabling Distant Horizons and Shaders and then adjust the video settings to your liking.

We recommend that you have at least 2GB (or ideally, 3GB) of RAM for this modpack.

If you have limited RAM, You can try and follow [this guide](https://github.com/embeddedt/ModernFix/wiki/Ultra%E2%80%90Low-Memory-Footprint) to configure ModernFix.

If you don't plan to enable the immersive way of playing this modpack in any case, you can completely disable the Distant Horizons, Indium, and Iris Shaders mod to possibly reduce memory usage even further.

If you do not plan to play in Singleplayer mode, you can disable server-side-only mods such as YUNG's Extras and YUNG's API as well.

This modpack is specifically made for the CvmcakKe Minecraft server.

Icon made by [tam_gmmz](https://www.instagram.com/tam_gmmz?igsh=MThpbnJ0a2YyeDEwag==)
